caption: A man with short, dark hair is seated in a recording studio, wearing over-ear headphones and a black zip-up jacket over a gray shirt. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background consists of dark gray acoustic foam panels with alternating vertical and horizontal patterns. Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a steady gaze and slightly open mouth as if speaking. In the top right frame, his right hand enters the frame, gesturing slightly. As the sequence progresses, the man's head shifts slightly and his facial expression remains relatively neutral. The microphone and the acoustic panels remain static in the background, while the man's subtle movements and hand gesture indicate he is engaged in a conversation or recording a podcast.
